author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Combined Convention 1991 - Questions and Answers
content:

1 Bhante's correspondence with Alexandra David-Nee l?
2-3 Awareness of the natural environment and the B uddha's close contact with nature

11-12 Wisdom being feminine

15 Enjoying cultures of different kinds/civilizati ons
Practising one's sadhana daily
15 The four levels of awareness and their sources
16-17 Promiscuity and monogamy - discouraging excl usiveness

precepts practised perfectly?
18 Skilful sex?
